top_signals.title: Australian Pension Seeks Apartments as Build-to-Rent Costs Rise
top_signals.summary: One of Australia’s largest pension funds is snapping up completed apartment blocks rather than backing new developments, betting that high construction costs and interest rates make build-to-rent projects too risky.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: US floats new tariffs on 60 economies over forced labor, including China
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Copper price: Goldman, Citi make bullish calls on supply woes
top_signals.summary: Goldman now sees prices $13,735/ton by the end of this year, more than 10% higher than its previous target of $12,465/ton.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: OpenAI upgrades GPT-5.5, as it plans to retire legacy ChatGPT models
top_signals.summary: OpenAI says it's rolling out a new update that improves the existing GPT-5.5 Instant model, and this move comes ahead of the scheduled retirement of multiple legacy models, including o3. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
